title: 黄金矿工 - Gold Miner
description: You are a gold miner trying to reach money targets within time limits! Control a swinging claw that automatically moves left and right at the top of the mine. Deploy the claw to grab valuable items from below - gold nuggets, diamonds, and rocks. Each item has different values and weights affecting how fast the claw retracts. Meet the level target before time runs out to advance. Between levels, visit the shop to buy power-ups like dynamite to destroy unwanted items or strength potions to speed up retraction. Progress through increasingly challenging levels with higher targets!
controls:
SPACE: Deploy/release the claw to grab items
D: Use dynamite (destroys currently grabbed item, purchased from shop)
S: Use strength potion (speeds up claw retraction, purchased from shop)
ENTER: Start game / Continue to next level / Enter shop
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: 黄金矿工 (Gold Miner)
description: Control a gold miner's mechanical claw to extract valuable items from underground mines! Your claw swings automatically left and right - press SPACE to deploy it downward to grab gold nuggets, diamonds, and rocks. Each item has different values: small gold ($50), large gold ($500), diamonds ($600), and rocks ($10). Heavier items slow down the claw's retraction speed. Meet the money target within the time limit to advance to the next level with higher goals and more complex layouts.
controls:
SPACE: Deploy claw downward to grab items
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart to main menu (from game over screen)
Arrow Keys: Navigate shop menu (between levels)

title: 黄金矿工-可存档，复活，双人模式，联机对战
description: You are a gold miner on a quest to collect treasure! Your claw swings continuously—press SPACE to drop it and grab gold nuggets, diamonds, rocks, and mystery bags. Heavier items take longer to retrieve. Each level has a 60-second timer and a money goal that increases with each stage. Meet the target to advance, or it's game over! Between levels, visit the shop to buy power-ups like dynamite and strength potions. Complete 10 unique levels and keep climbing through increasingly challenging layouts!
controls:
SPACE: Drop/release the claw to grab items
Z: Use dynamite (if purchased, destroys grabbed item)
Arrow Keys: Navigate shop menu (up/down to select, right to buy)
ENTER: Start game / Confirm shop purchase
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Leps World Jump N Run Games
description: Guide Lep the leprechaun through a challenging platformer adventure! Navigate through levels filled with enemies, collect gold coins for points, and grab cloverleaves to restore health. Jump on enemies to defeat them, avoid falling into pits, and reach the flag at the end of each level to progress. You have 3 health points - lose them all or fall into a pit and you'll restart the level. Can you master all the worlds and collect every coin?
controls:
Arrow Keys (←/→): Move left and right
Space: Jump (hold for higher jump)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
Escape: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart from game over screen

title: Leps World Jump N Run Games
description: Guide Lep the leprechaun through magical platforming worlds! Navigate treacherous levels filled with enemies, collect shimmering gold coins for points, and gather healing cloverleaves to restore your health. Jump on enemy heads to defeat them, but beware of falling into pits or losing all your health. Reach the flag at the end of each level to progress through increasingly challenging stages across mystical realms.
controls:
A/D Keys: Move left/right
W Key: Jump (tap for normal jump, hold for higher jump)
Arrow Keys: Alternative movement (←/→ move, ↑ jumps)
Space: Jump
Enter: Start game
Escape: Pause/unpause
R: Restart (when game over)

title: Lep's World - Jump n Run Games
description: Guide Lep the Leprechaun through a colorful platformer adventure! Navigate through treacherous terrain, leap over chasms, and dodge dangerous enemies like angry bees and crawling beetles. Collect shimmering gold coins to boost your score and grab cloverleaf power-ups to restore your health. You start with 3 hearts - don't let them run out! Reach the flag at the end of each level to progress. Can you master all the challenges and achieve the highest score?
controls:
Arrow Left: Move left
Arrow Right: Move right
Space: Jump (hold for higher jumps)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

title: Traffic Run
description: Navigate your vehicle through busy intersections by timing your acceleration perfectly. Your car automatically stops at each crossing where traffic flows perpendicular to your path. Press SPACE to accelerate forward through gaps in the traffic. Collect coins for points and avoid collisions to survive. Each successful crossing increases the difficulty with faster and denser traffic. How many intersections can you conquer?
controls:
SPACE: Accelerate vehicle forward through intersection
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Worms Zone - Hungry Snake Arena
description: Control a hungry worm in a competitive arena, growing larger by consuming colorful food pellets scattered across the map. Eliminate opponents by making them crash into your body, then feast on their remains. Collect power-ups for temporary abilities like speed boosts and food magnets. Survive as long as possible while climbing the leaderboard to become the largest worm in the arena!
controls:
Arrow Keys: Steer your worm's direction (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Activate speed boost (drains mass while active)
Z: Use magnet power-up when collected
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Worms Zone Io Hungry Snake
description: Control a worm in a circular arena, consuming food pellets to grow longer and heavier. Avoid colliding with arena walls and other worms' bodies. Use boost to outmaneuver opponents and force them into your body. Collect power-ups for temporary advantages. Survive and grow to achieve the highest mass on the leaderboard!
controls:
Arrow Keys (←↑→↓): Steer the worm's direction
Space: Activate speed boost (consumes 10 mass per second)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Jelly Shift - Obstacle Course
description: Navigate your jelly character through an endless obstacle course! Change your jelly's shape between tall and short to squeeze through gaps and barriers. Collect diamonds for points and build combos by avoiding obstacles to enter Jelly Fever mode for a speed boost. Reach the finish line of each level to progress. The game gets progressively harder with faster speeds and more complex obstacles.
controls:
UP ARROW: Change jelly to tall/thin shape
DOWN ARROW: Change jelly to short/wide shape
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Jelly Shift Obstacle Course
description: Navigate a continuously moving jelly character through an obstacle course by shifting its height to match gaps. Collect diamonds, avoid collisions, and trigger Jelly Fever by passing obstacles consecutively for speed boosts. Progress through levels with increasing difficulty and unlock new jelly skins with collected diamonds.
controls:
W / Up Arrow: Shift jelly to TALL height
S / Down Arrow: Shift jelly to FLAT height
(No key): Default MEDIUM height
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to start screen

title: Bounce & Collect
description: Drop balls from the top of the screen to bounce through a peg-filled board, aiming to hit multiplier gates that duplicate your balls. Each ball lands in a collection bin at the bottom, earning points based on the bin's value. Complete levels by reaching target scores within limited drops. Strategic placement and timing are key to maximizing your score through multipliers!
controls:
LEFT ARROW: Move drop position left
RIGHT ARROW: Move drop position right
SPACE: Drop ball at current position
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

title: Bounce And Collect
description: Drop balls strategically into a physics-based arena filled with pegs, multipliers, and obstacles. Your goal is to maximize your score by positioning each ball drop to hit high-value multiplier gates (x2, x5, +10 balls) before landing in collection bins. Complete each level by reaching the target score with limited ball drops. Progress through increasingly complex levels with moving obstacles and unlock new ball skins.
controls:
LEFT ARROW: Move drop position left
RIGHT ARROW: Move drop position right
SPACE: Drop a ball from current position
ENTER: Start game (from START screen)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (from GAME_OVER screen)

title: Coffee Stack
description: Stack and serve the perfect coffee! Guide your growing tower of cups through a multi-lane track, collecting empty cups, filling them with coffee, adding sleeves and lids to complete drinks. Avoid obstacles that knock items off your stack. At the end, serve your completed drinks to waiting customers for coins. Use coins to unlock new cup designs and upgrades that boost your earnings. Complete drinks earn more coins!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move stack horizontally between lanes
Arrow Up: Speed boost (consumes energy)
Space: Collect items when near collection points
Z: Quick dodge left
Shift: Quick dodge right

title: Coffee Stack
description: Navigate your growing stack of coffee cups through a lane-based course! Collect empty cups, pass through gates to fill them with coffee, add sleeves, and attach lids to increase their value. Avoid obstacles that destroy cups from your stack. At the end, serve your customized cups to customers for coins. Earn more coins with larger, fully-customized stacks!
controls:
Arrow Left / A: Move stack to the left lane
Arrow Right / D: Move stack to the right lane
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart from game over screen

title: Bridge Race
description: Race against AI opponents in a fast-paced bridge-building competition! Collect colored blocks matching your character's color to build bridges across water gaps and climb to higher platforms. Knock into opponents to steal their blocks. Be the first to cross the finish line to win! Each level increases in difficulty with more complex layouts and faster opponents.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character (Up/Down/Left/Right)
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to start screen

title: Bridge Race
description: Race against 3 AI opponents across multi-lane tracks to be the first to cross the finish line! Collect colored blocks scattered on the track and use them to build bridges over water gaps. Knock into opponents to make them drop blocks, which you can steal. Progress through increasingly challenging levels with longer tracks, wider gaps, and more aggressive AI.
controls:
Arrow Left / A: Steer left across lanes
Arrow Right / D: Steer right across lanes
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

title: Snake VS Block
description: Control a snake made of glowing orbs as it races endlessly upward through a dangerous gauntlet of numbered blocks. Your snake shrinks when hitting blocks (by the number shown), but grows by collecting floating orbs. Survive as long as possible by weaving through gaps, targeting low-numbered blocks, and gathering orbs to maintain your length. The game ends when your snake runs out of orbs. Score increases with distance traveled and orbs collected.
controls:
Left Arrow: Move snake left
Right Arrow: Move snake right
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

title: Snake Vs Block
description: Control a snake made of numbered balls as it automatically moves forward through an endless vertical track. Collide with numbered blocks to reduce the snake by that number, or collect floating balls to grow longer. The goal is to survive as long as possible by maintaining your snake's length above zero while traveling the maximum distance. Blocks increase in value as you progress, making survival increasingly challenging.
controls:
Arrow Left / A: Steer snake left
Arrow Right / D: Steer snake right
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over screen)

title: Cannon Shot!
description: Guide cannon balls into target buckets by strategically placing ramps and bumpers! Each level gives you a limited number of redirecting objects to position before firing 20 balls from the cannon. Your goal is to get the required number of balls into each colored bucket to complete the level. Plan carefully - once you fire, physics takes over! Complete levels to unlock new cannon designs and face increasingly challenging puzzles.
controls:
Arrow Keys: Move selected object (when in placement mode)
Space: Fire cannon (when ready) / Reset level (after firing)
Z: Rotate selected object counterclockwise
X: Rotate selected object clockwise
A/D: Cycle through available objects to place
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Traffic Run
description: Navigate your vehicle through dangerous intersections filled with fast-moving traffic. Hold SPACE to accelerate forward and release to brake. Time your movements carefully to slip through gaps in the cross-traffic without colliding. Each successful crossing earns you coins and advances you to more challenging intersections with faster traffic and more lanes. One collision ends your run!
controls:
SPACE: Hold to accelerate forward, release to brake
ENTER: Start the game from the title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart after game over

title: Spill It! - Physics Puzzle Game
description: Drop balls to topple glasses in this physics-based puzzle game! Each level presents a set of glasses that you must knock over by strategically dropping a limited number of balls. You need to knock over at least 80% of the glasses to progress to the next level. Complete levels to unlock new ball skins and themes. The challenge increases with more glasses, obstacles, and trickier arrangements!
controls:
LEFT/RIGHT ARROW or A/D: Move ball drop position horizontally
SPACE: Drop a ball from current position
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart to title screen from game over

title: Cannon Shot
description: Guide cannon balls into buckets by strategically positioning ramps and deflectors! Each level gives you a limited number of balls to fill all buckets. Position the movable objects carefully, then fire the cannon to watch physics do its magic. Fill every bucket with at least one ball to win and unlock the next level. Run out of balls before completing the objective, and you'll need to try again!
controls:
Arrow Keys (←→): Select/move between objects
Space: Pick up/drop object (toggle grab mode)
A/D or Arrow Up/Down: Rotate grabbed object
Enter: Start game from menu
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart from game over screen
Z: Fire cannon (when in playing phase and not editing)

title: Long Neck Run
description: Guide your character through an endless obstacle course, collecting colored rings to grow your neck! Match your character's color to collect rings safely - correct colors add +1 to your neck length, wrong colors cost you -2. Navigate through challenging obstacles like zip lines and pools that require minimum neck lengths to pass. Survive as long as possible while collecting gems to unlock new character skins. The longer your neck, the more gems you earn!
controls:
Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move character horizontally across the path
Space: Change character color (cycles through available colors)
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

title: Spill It
description: Drop balls from the top of the screen to knock over all the glasses on various platforms. Use physics and chain reactions to your advantage. Complete each level with limited balls to progress through increasingly challenging puzzles. Topple all glasses to win!
controls:
SPACE: Drop a ball from the top center of the screen
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the start screen from game over

title: Mob Control
description: Command your cannon to fire waves of units up multi-lane battlefields! Strategically aim through multiplier gates (x2, x3, +50) to amplify your forces before they clash with enemies. Deploy powerful Champion units to break through defenses. Your mission: destroy the enemy base (500 HP) before they destroy yours. Earn Championship Stars and unlock card packs to upgrade your units and dominate higher leagues!
controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Aim cannon left/right
Space: Fire units continuously (hold to keep firing)
Z: Deploy Champion unit (costs 100 units)
Shift: Speed boost for next wave (costs 50 units)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

title: Long Neck Run
description: Navigate an endless runner as a character with a growing neck! Collect rings matching your current color to extend your neck, avoid wrong-colored rings that shrink it, and duck under or jump over obstacles. Your neck must be long enough to clear barriers and ziplines. The track gets faster and more complex over time. Survive as long as possible and achieve the maximum distance!
controls:
Arrow Left: Move character left
Arrow Right: Move character right
Arrow Up: Jump (when on ground)
Arrow Down: Duck (crouch to pass under low obstacles)
ENTER: Start game (from start screen)
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

title: Square Bird - Flappy Chicken
description: Guide your square bird through an endless side-scrolling world! Tap SPACE to lay eggs and jump upward. Each egg stacks beneath you, helping you clear tall barriers and gaps. Land perfectly on the ground 3 times in a row to activate Square Bird Fever - temporary invulnerability with bonus points! Collect feathers for currency. Survive as long as possible and rack up the highest distance score!
controls:
SPACE: Lay an egg and jump upward
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen (available after game over)

title: Go Escape!
description: Guide a rolling ball through challenging platforming levels! Your ball automatically rolls forward, and you must time your jumps perfectly to clear gaps, avoid obstacles, and reach the goal. Watch out for vanishing platforms that disappear after you land on them, and moving blocks that can knock you off course. One mistake means starting the level over. Complete all levels to win!
controls:
SPACE: Jump (fixed height and distance)
ENTER: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu from game over screen

title: Hide Ball: Brain Teaser Games
description: Hide Ball is a physics-based puzzle game where you must protect good balls (green) from monster balls (red). Use your limited moves to strategically place blocks and barriers in the environment. After you've used all your moves, the monster balls activate and seek out the good balls. Keep all good balls safe for 5 seconds to win the level!
controls:
Arrow Keys / WASD: Move selected block
Space: Select/Deselect block to move
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu (from game over screen)

title: Red Wrecker - Physics Puzzle Game
description: Red Wrecker is a physics-based puzzle game where you must eliminate all red shapes while keeping all green shapes safely on the platform. Click on shapes to remove them from the game, causing the remaining pieces to fall and settle according to realistic physics. Complete all 100 levels by clearing every red shape without letting any green shape fall off the platform. Carefully plan your moves - you have limited clicks per level!
controls:
MOUSE CLICK: Remove a shape from the game (during gameplay)
ENTER: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the start screen (from game over)
SPACE: Skip to next level (when level is won)
